description: Single source of truth for environment variables. Consumed by (1) per-package zod env schemas that validate at boot, (2) scripts/bootstrap-env.mjs which generates .env.local files, and (3) the Repobot platform when provisioning environments. Classes: config = committed non-secret, public = per-project client-safe value, secret = server-only, never committed, never VITE_-prefixed.

vars.name: DATABASE_URL
vars.description: Postgres connection string for the environment's database.

vars.name: AUTH_MODE
vars.description: 'local' (emulator-only dev principal tokens) or 'builtin' (the kernel's own auth service). Deployed boot refuses 'local'.

vars.name: LOCAL_AUTH_SECRET
vars.description: HS256 secret for locally issued dev tokens. Generated per checkout by bootstrap:env; never used in deployed environments.

vars.name: AUTH_JWT_SECRET
vars.description: HS256 secret (hex) that signs and verifies built-in auth JWTs. Generated per environment by the platform when the deploy manifest declares the AUTH capability.

vars.name: AUTH_PUBLIC_URL
vars.description: Public URL of the auth__request__api function; used for OAuth callbacks and the magic-link fallback URLs in auth emails.

vars.name: APP_BASE_URL
vars.description: The environment's live site URL ({{ .SiteURL }} in auth emails, OAuth redirect allowlist). Tracks the custom domain when one is active.

vars.name: SMTP_HOST
vars.description: SMTP host for auth emails. Empty = degraded mode: signups auto-confirm and OTP/recovery emails are unavailable.

vars.name: SMTP_PORT
vars.description: SMTP port (587 STARTTLS or 465 TLS).

vars.name: SMTP_USER
vars.description: SMTP account username.

vars.name: SMTP_PASS
vars.description: SMTP account password / API key.

vars.name: SMTP_SENDER_EMAIL
vars.description: From address for auth emails. Switches to the customer's verified sender domain when one is active.

vars.name: SMTP_SENDER_NAME
vars.description: Display name for the auth email From header.

vars.name: AUTH_EMAIL_TEMPLATES
vars.description: Auth email template overrides (repobot.emails.json contract, layered with dashboard overrides by the platform) as JSON or base64-encoded JSON. Empty = kernel defaults.

vars.name: GOOGLE_SIGNIN_CLIENT_ID
vars.description: Google OAuth client id for the 'google' sign-in method. Injected from the account's Google Sign-In integration; empty when not connected.

vars.name: GOOGLE_SIGNIN_CLIENT_SECRET
vars.description: Google OAuth client secret for the server-side code exchange.

vars.name: TOPIC_PREFIX
vars.description: Namespace prefix for every Pub/Sub topic (deployed environments share a GCP project). Injected by the platform; empty locally.

vars.name: PAYMENTS_MODE
vars.description: 'local' (in-app simulated test checkout, emulator/tests only) or 'stripe' (real Stripe Checkout Sessions). Deployed boot refuses 'local'.

vars.name: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
vars.description: Stripe API secret key for creating and verifying Checkout Sessions. Injected by the platform from the account's connected Stripe integration when the deploy manifest declares the PAYMENTS capability; never present locally.

vars.name: AI_MODE
vars.description: 'local' (simulated assistant, emulator/tests only) or 'openai' (real OpenAI models). Deployed boot refuses 'local'.

vars.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
vars.description: OpenAI API secret key for the chat model and realtime voice sessions. Injected by the platform from the account's connected OpenAI integration when the deploy manifest declares the AI capability; never present locally (the sandbox runs AI_MODE=local).

vars.name: VITE_GRAPHQL_URL
vars.description: GraphQL endpoint the web app talks to.

vars.name: VITE_AUTH_MODE
vars.description: Mirrors AUTH_MODE for the web client. In builtin mode the client derives the auth endpoint from VITE_GRAPHQL_URL.

vars.name: VITE_APP_NAME
vars.description: Display name shown on the login page brand row. Falls back to 'AuthBot' when unset.

vars.name: VITE_AUTH_METHODS
vars.description: Comma-separated sign-in methods rendered by the login surface, in order: email-code, password, google, anonymous (apple not yet supported by builtin auth). Defaults to email-code. google requires the environment's Google Sign-In integration.

vars.name: VITE_AUTH_GOOGLE_ENABLED
vars.description: Legacy alias: 'true' appends google to VITE_AUTH_METHODS. Prefer listing google in VITE_AUTH_METHODS directly. Off by default: environments without the Google Sign-In integration have no OAuth provider configured.

vars.name: VITE_LOCAL_AUTH_TOKEN
vars.description: Signed dev-principal JWT generated by bootstrap:env. Local mode only.
